title: Group Move to: Board - Select NEW Board Option
excerpt: It is nice to have the feature to move an existing group to another board. It would also be helpful for our team to be able to move the group to a brand new board instead of only the option to choose one that was already…

posts.author: melimber (Maggie Limberty)
posts.cookedHtml:
It is nice to have the feature to move an existing group to another board. It would also be helpful for our team to be able to move the group to a brand new board instead of only the option to choose one that was already created.

Thanks for your consideration.
